groups.label: Neutrals
groups.note: Neutral and near-neutral seeds should stay quiet, monotone, and free of chroma theatrics.

seed.label: Warm Neutral
seed.note: Warm gray / bone family for neutral-specific behavior and temperature handling.

seed.label: Cool Neutral
seed.note: Cool gray / slate family for neutral-specific behavior and temperature handling.

seed.label: Paper Gray
seed.note: Nearly achromatic warm paper.

seed.label: Warm Chroma Edge
seed.note: Near-neutral just below chromatic behavior.

seed.label: Cool Chroma Edge
seed.note: Cool near-neutral just below chromatic behavior.

groups.label: Warm Hues
groups.note: Yellows, oranges, reds, and roses should avoid muddy shadows and harsh top clips.

seed.label: Cadmium Yellow
seed.note: Bright yellow that stresses high-lightness chroma and warm shadow shaping.

seed.label: Amber
seed.note: High-energy warm yellow-orange.

seed.label: Orange
seed.note: Saturated orange body color.

seed.label: Red
seed.note: Vivid red with difficult dark behavior.

seed.label: Rose
seed.note: Cool red-pink crossing into magenta.

groups.label: Greens
groups.note: Green families reveal cusp flash, leafy body drift, teal transitions, and ink retention.

seed.label: Bright Lime
seed.note: Canonical hard case: luminous yellow-green seed with extreme high-lightness chroma.

seed.label: Lime Cool Neighbor
seed.note: Slightly cooler high-lightness lime cusp.

seed.label: Leaf Green
seed.note: Mid-light natural green body.

seed.label: Phthalo Green
seed.note: Cool deep green between green and cyan; useful for path-family blending pressure.

seed.label: Teal
seed.note: Bridge between phthalo and cyan behavior.

groups.label: Cool Hues
groups.note: Cyan through violet should keep fresh tints and avoid dead blue-violet tails.

seed.label: Cyan
seed.note: High-energy cyan where gamut geometry shifts quickly between highlights and shadows.

seed.label: Sky Blue
seed.note: Clean blue-cyan highlight family.

seed.label: Ultramarine
seed.note: Deep vivid blue seed that tests dark retention and blue highlight presence.

seed.label: Violet
seed.note: Mid-dark vivid violet that often wants richer mids and inkier shadows.

seed.label: Purple
seed.note: Blue-violet bridge into magenta.

groups.label: Perturbations
groups.note: Nearby hue variants around the tuned hard cases catch overfitting and boundary jumps.

seed.label: Lime h115
seed.note: Warmer neighbor of the bright lime cusp.

seed.label: Lime h130
seed.note: Cooler neighbor of the bright lime cusp.

seed.label: Cyan h195
seed.note: Green-leaning cyan perturbation.

seed.label: Cyan h220
seed.note: Blue-leaning cyan perturbation.

seed.label: Phthalo h155
seed.note: Greener phthalo perturbation.

seed.label: Phthalo h175
seed.note: Tealer phthalo perturbation.
